title: bromus ramosus var. macrostachys
intro: Bromus ramosus var. macrostachys, also known as tall wood brome or tall wood bromegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the grass is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component in herbal blends to leverage its medicinal properties.
